labels.demoDescription: See the solution in action. Response within 24h.

trust.experience: Proprietary solutions built and deployed by the Mohtaoua team in Morocco.
trust.methodology: Demo → setup → deployment → training → ongoing support.

e-nfc.metaTitle: e-NFC — Digital Cards & Smart Networking | Mohtaoua
e-nfc.metaDescription: NFC cards, QR codes and digital profiles to share contact details in one tap. Mohtaoua solution for sales teams, events and brands.

overview.what: Digital business cards, NFC products, QR codes and smart profiles for professional networking.
overview.who: B2B sales teams, Executives and founders, Event teams, Real estate agencies, Training centers

e-nfc.problem: Paper cards get lost, contact details go stale and post-event follow-up stays manual and fragmented.
e-nfc.solution: e-NFC centralizes your professional identity on an NFC card or QR code: rich profile, instant sharing, analytics and CRM sync.
howItWorks: Create digital profile and card design

pricing.note: From 299 MAD/card — team packs on quote

faqs.question: Do users need an app to scan?
faqs.answer: No — a simple NFC tap or QR scan opens the profile in the browser on iOS and Android.

faqs.question: Can we update the profile without replacing the card?
faqs.answer: Yes — content is dynamic; edit the profile while the physical card stays the same.

faqs.question: Does e-NFC integrate with our CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes — contact export and webhooks to HubSpot, Pipedrive or Mohtaoua CRM.

archidoc.metaTitle: Archidoc — DMS, OCR & Document Archiving | Mohtaoua
archidoc.metaDescription: Mohtaoua DMS: digitization, OCR, auto-classification and secure archiving for firms, clinics and government.

overview.what: Document management, secure archiving, OCR and DMS for your digital transformation.
overview.who: Law firms, Accounting firms, Clinics and hospitals, Government, Manufacturing

archidoc.problem: Scattered paper files, slow search, loss risk and hard-to-prove compliance during audits.
archidoc.solution: Archidoc digitizes, indexes and secures documents with multilingual OCR, approval workflows and instant full-text search.

pricing.note: Monthly license by volume — custom quote

faqs.question: Is Archidoc hosted in Morocco?
faqs.answer: Yes — secure hosting with private cloud options and encrypted backups.

faqs.question: Does OCR support Arabic and French?
faqs.answer: Yes — multilingual OCR with assisted correction.

faqs.question: Can we meet legal archiving requirements?
faqs.answer: Compliant archiving with timestamps, hashes and audit logs.

erp-restaurant.problem: POS, kitchen and inventory in separate tools: stockouts, order errors and invisible margins.
erp-restaurant.solution: Restaurant ERP unifies POS, kitchen tickets, inventory and purchasing with margin analytics per dish.

faqs.question: Does it work offline?
faqs.answer: POS runs offline and syncs when back online.

faqs.question: Works with existing printers?
faqs.answer: Yes — ESC/POS and certified register integrations.

faqs.question: Multi-restaurant support?
faqs.answer: Yes — centralized dashboard with consolidated reports.

faqs.question: Migrate from Excel?
faqs.answer: Assisted CSV import and field mapping in one day.

faqs.question: WhatsApp integrated?
faqs.answer: Yes — conversations synced on the contact record.

whatsapp-automation.solution: WhatsApp Automation connects Business API to smart flows: welcome, qualification, reminders and sales handoff.

faqs.answer: Yes — we handle migration from standard or Business app.

faqs.question: Can we send campaigns?
faqs.answer: Yes — via approved Meta templates with CRM segmentation.

faqs.question: Multiple agents on one number?

overview.what: Dashboards, analytics, reporting and KPI visualization to steer your business.
overview.who: Executives, Marketing directors, Ops & finance, Retail chains, Manufacturing

faqs.answer: ERP, CRM, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Shopify, SQL databases and Excel files.
